jobs.name: issue-sweep — Route open issues to the right agent (label-aware)
memory-automerge-sweep — Drain memory:promote PRs (beats throttled GH cron)
jobs.description: Daemon-driven trigger: dispatch dev-mesh-memory-automerge.yml when open memory:promote PRs exist, on the reliable ~10min cadence (GH cron is throttled to ~2.6h+).

jobs.name: review-respond-sweep — Address CHANGES_REQUESTED PRs (beats throttled GH cron)
jobs.description: Daemon-driven trigger: dispatch dev-mesh-review-respond.yml when open non-draft CHANGES_REQUESTED PRs exist, on the reliable ~10min cadence (GH cron is throttled to ~3-5h, stalling the code pipeline + causing false needs-human escalations).

jobs.name: merge-sweep — Report-only: inspect the merge-gate state
jobs.description: Read-only inspect: issue-gate -> automerge -> memory; writes mesh/reports/merge-sweep.json. No merges/labels.

jobs.name: merge-sweep-remediate — ②: escalate items the fixers couldn't clear
jobs.description: Backstop: escalate report items the fixers couldn't clear as deduped needs-human issues; track lifecycle. No code changes.

jobs.name: post-merge-reconcile — Close issues whose closing PR merged
autofix-pr-sweep — Escalate bug-autofix PRs closed without merging
needs-human-cleanup — Close stale needs-human issues whose PR merged/closed
jobs.description: Cleanup: when a needs-human backstop's referenced PR is MERGED or CLOSED, the issue is stale — close it with done label.
